results.title: Trump tells agencies to align with study calling for narrower childhood vaccine recommendations
12 Hidden iPhone Features Apple Added Before WWDC In 2026
results.description: Hidden iPhone features in iOS 26.3, 26.4, and 26.5 include encrypted texts to Android friends, a carrier location limiter, an average sleep tracker, and a new Apple Maps discovery tool — and most users have no idea they're there. Here's everything you missed in 2026, plus what's coming next. The post 12 Hidden iPhone Features Apple Added Before WWDC In 2026 appeared first on Memeburn .

results.title: Thinkerbell and Inclusively Made launch AI platform to reduce disability bias in advertising
results.description: Thinkerbell and Inclusively Made have launched Inclusivelymade.ai, a tool that embeds disability inclusion checks into advertising and film production from the idea stage. Backers include Nine, Bupa, Woolworths, and Mastercard.

results.title: Osmania University Hosts Online Awareness Programme on Knimbus Digital Library Platform
results.description: The programme focuses on enhancing digital resource literacy among faculty, students, and researchers. Vice‐Chancellor stresses adoption of modern technologies for academic excellence. Knimbus trainer explains advanced features, remote access, and e‐resource navigation.

results.title: Huawei’s ‘Tau Scaling’ Push Signals China’s Bet on Speed to Beat U.S. Sanctions
results.description: China’s technology battle with the United States may be entering a new phase after Huawei Technologies unveiled a chip design strategy that seeks to bypass one of the biggest obstacles created by U.S. export restrictions: the inability to access the world’s most advanced semiconductor manufacturing tools. According to Reuters, rather than continuing the traditional semiconductor [...] The post Huawei’s ‘Tau Scaling’ Push Signals China’s Bet on Speed to Beat U.S. Sanctions appeared first on Tekedia .
